refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall minimize cycle time by optimizing load, travel, and dump operations to meet the customer-defined cycle time target.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad; refining it into a focus on minimizing cycle time through the key cycle phases clarifies the functional scope and enables targeted design solutions.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure the 95th percentile cycle time (p95) under the agreed duty cycle and site conditions and verify it meets or is below the CT_target.

candidate_dps: DP1: Adaptive cycle phase scheduling algorithm
DP2: Real-time cycle time monitoring and feedback control
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Adaptive cycle phase scheduling algorithm

potential_sources: Interdependence between load, travel, and dump phases requiring coordinated scheduling
coupling_check.notes: The adaptive scheduling algorithm logically decouples cycle phases but requires coordination to avoid timing conflicts.

assumptions_risks: Assumes accurate real-time data on cycle phase status is available
Risk that scheduling algorithm complexity may impact real-time responsiveness
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider integrating real-time monitoring (DP2) in next decomposition level to mitigate risks.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Overall system-level coordination and optimization of cycle time through scheduling logic

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives real-time vehicle and operation status data for scheduling decisions

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Sends optimized operation schedules to Vehicle and Teleoperation modules

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports communication between NGHE Solution and distributed modules

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as scheduling logic is centralized here; low diffusion risk.
Vehicle module contains execution but not scheduling logic; diffusion risk if scheduling logic is duplicated here.
Teleoperation focuses on remote control, not scheduling; risk of diffusion if scheduling logic is spread here.
Safety Services unrelated to scheduling; minimal containment or diffusion.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing the adaptive scheduling algorithm in the NGHE Solution module minimizes diffusion and supports clear ownership.
containment_risks: Potential performance bottleneck if centralized scheduling logic cannot meet real-time demands
Dependency on reliable telemetry data from Vehicle and Teleoperation modules
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Monitor performance and consider partial delegation to Vehicle or Teleoperation if needed.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP (adaptive scheduling algorithm) logically satisfies the refined FR by addressing cycle time optimization across phases.

diffusion_risks: Risk of scheduling logic duplication if Vehicle or Teleoperation modules implement overlapping functionality
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Centralizing DP in NGHE Solution module supports strong containment and ownership clarity.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification via telemetry data and cycle time measurements is feasible at the NGHE Solution level.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of scheduling DP to NGHE Solution IM with well-defined interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Plan for integration of real-time monitoring DP in next level to reduce scheduling risks
Define interface contracts explicitly to avoid diffusion across Vehicle and Teleoperation

decision.justification: The current level of decomposition and assignments meet the requirements with acceptable risk and clear ownership; no immediate need to revise or zigzag.

revise.why: To incorporate real-time monitoring and feedback control in subsequent decomposition levels to mitigate identified risks.

assumptions: Telemetry data is accurate and timely
Centralized scheduling can meet real-time constraints
open_risks: Data dependency on Vehicle and Teleoperation modules
evidence_needed: Performance benchmarks of scheduling algorithm in NGHE Solution
Telemetry data latency and reliability metrics
